items.briefing:
Developers and web teams should be aware that attackers have compromised a popular npm software package called Jscrambler, hiding malicious code designed to steal information from anyone using it. If your organisation uses third-party software packages or has developers building or maintaining websites and applications, it's worth checking with your tech team whether this affects any of your systems.

Separately, a new study highlights that many Australians face significant barriers breaking into the cyber security workforce, which may affect how organisations plan to fill security roles going forward.

**Practical tip:** Ask your developers to audit any third-party software packages in use and verify they're running trusted, up-to-date versions.

featured.title: CyberPath study says barriers block cyber job entry
featured.quote: Certification barriers and unclear entry standards are blocking Australians from pursuing cybersecurity careers.
